title: Rotten Flesh To Leather
description: This mod adds Cooked Rotten Meat, which is obtained by smelting Rotten Meat. Five Cooked Rotten Meats can be placed on a crafting table to obtain leather.
body:
# Rotten Flesh to Leather
## Description
This mod adds Cooked Rotten Meat, which is obtained by smelting Rotten Meat. 
Five Cooked Rotten Meats can be placed on a crafting table to obtain leather.
The idea of the 5:1 ratio is to be able to get leather but maintaining some "difficulty" in the process.

## Recipes
Convert Rotten Flesh to Cooked Rotten Flesh by smelting it in a furnace.
![Cooked Rotten Flesh recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d77a0a720188e0a0ee687d72fae263f1f597d1f.png)

Then craft one leather by placing five pieces of Cooked Rotten Flesh (One in each corner and one in the center).
![Cooked Rotten Flesh to Leather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f3536dca5c104b36fae6afc7acbd9be7a4b231d.png)


## Versions
### 1.0.0
- Initial release. Adds one item and two recipes to convert Rotten Flesh into Leather.
